## Tags
badge, medal, honour, decoration, order, pin, laurel, trophy, medallion, insignia, bronze, silver, gold

## Categories
sports, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/circle-star)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleStar;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleStar { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
